meeting_analysis.name: meeting_analysis
meeting_analysis.description: Analyze meeting transcript and generate comprehensive report with actionable insights
meeting_analysis.template:
Analyze this meeting transcript using Gemini AI and provide comprehensive business analysis:

Meeting URL: {{meeting_url}}
Lead ID: {{lead_id}}
Transcript: {{transcript}}

Provide detailed analysis including:
1. Meeting summary (2-3 sentences)
2. Key decisions made
3. Action items with deadlines and assignees
4. Lead qualification score (1-10)
5. Next steps and follow-up
6. Risk assessment
7. Opportunities identified
8. Budget indicators
9. Decision makers identified
10. Timeline urgency

Return ONLY valid JSON format:
{
  "summary": "Brief meeting summary",
  "decisions": ["Decision 1", "Decision 2"],
  "action_items": [
    {
      "task": "Task description",
      "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "assignee": "Name",
      "priority": "High/Medium/Low"
    }
  ],
  "lead_score": 8,
  "next_steps": ["Step 1", "Step 2"],
  "risks": ["Risk 1", "Risk 2"],
  "opportunities": ["Opportunity 1", "Opportunity 2"],
  "budget_indicators": ["Indicator 1", "Indicator 2"],
  "decision_makers": ["Name 1", "Name 2"],
  "timeline_urgency": "High/Medium/Low"
}

task_generation.name: task_generation
task_generation.description: Generate actionable tasks from meeting analysis with clear ownership and deadlines

lead_qualification.name: lead_qualification
lead_qualification.description: Qualify lead based on meeting content and BANT criteria
lead_qualification.template:
Qualify this lead based on meeting transcript using BANT criteria:

Lead Info: {{lead_info}}
Transcript: {{transcript}}

Evaluate:
1. Budget availability (1-10)
2. Decision-making authority (1-10)
3. Timeline urgency (1-10)
4. Fit with solution (1-10)
5. Competition presence
6. Overall qualification score
7. Qualification status
8. Recommendations

Return ONLY valid JSON format:
{
  "budget_score": 8,
  "authority_score": 7,
  "timeline_score": 9,
  "fit_score": 8,
  "competition_present": true,
  "overall_score": 8,
  "qualification_status": "Hot/Warm/Cold",
  "recommendations": ["Recommendation 1", "Recommendation 2"]
}

follow_up_email.name: follow_up_email
follow_up_email.description: Generate professional follow-up email based on meeting analysis
follow_up_email.template:
Generate professional follow-up email:

Lead Name: {{lead_name}}
Meeting Analysis: {{analysis}}

Create email with:
1. Thank you for meeting
2. Key points discussed
3. Next steps
4. Attachments/links
5. Call to action

Return email content in markdown format.

meeting_checklist.name: meeting_checklist
meeting_checklist.description: Generate comprehensive meeting preparation and follow-up checklist with real business value

arguments.name: meeting_type
arguments.description: Type of meeting (sales, demo, follow-up, discovery, negotiation)

arguments.name: lead_info
arguments.description: Lead information including company, role, pain points

meeting_checklist.template:
Generate comprehensive meeting checklist for {{meeting_type}} meeting:

Lead Info: {{lead_info}}

Create detailed, actionable checklist with:
1. Pre-meeting preparation (research, materials, agenda)
2. During meeting actions (questions, documentation, qualification)
3. Post-meeting follow-up (emails, CRM updates, next steps)
4. Documentation requirements (notes, recordings, decisions)
5. Next steps and deadlines (proposals, demos, contracts)

Focus on sales effectiveness and lead qualification.

Return ONLY valid JSON format:
{
  "pre_meeting": [
    "Research company background and recent news",
    "Prepare personalized demo based on pain points",
    "Set up meeting recording and note-taking tools",
    "Review lead's previous interactions and history",
    "Prepare qualifying questions and objection handling"
  ],
  "during_meeting": [
    "Introduce yourself and establish rapport",
    "Ask discovery questions about current challenges",
    "Present relevant solution features and benefits",
    "Identify decision makers and budget authority",
    "Document key pain points and requirements",
    "Confirm next steps and timeline"
  ],
  "post_meeting": [
    "Send follow-up email within 2 hours",
    "Update CRM with meeting notes and outcomes",
    "Schedule next meeting or demo if qualified",
    "Share relevant case studies or materials",
    "Follow up on any outstanding questions"
  ],
  "documentation": [
    "Meeting notes with key decisions",
    "Action items with owners and deadlines",
    "Lead qualification score and status",
    "Next meeting agenda and objectives",
    "Competitive landscape and positioning"
  ],
  "next_steps": [
    "Send proposal within 24 hours",
    "Schedule technical demo for next week",
    "Connect with decision maker directly",
    "Prepare ROI analysis and business case",
    "Follow up on contract terms and pricing"
  ]
}
